meaning: n.(带柄和倾口的)大水罐,(棒球)投手
examples: The Marlin pitcher struck out the first batter he faced.
He went to the mound to talk with a struggling pitcher who spoke only Spanish.
The baseball pitcher had a brief affair with her.
More meaningful for pitcher pay is a quite different figure: total number of strikeouts.
Former Brooklyn and Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher Carl Erskine performed the National Anthem on a harmonica.
